description: Lock cloud_data_warehouses to managed cloud analytical warehouse services, not generic relational warehouses or ERP reporting modules.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to Amazon Redshift's 2012 preview announcement as an early managed cloud data warehouse service.
Managed cloud warehouses are deployed as cloud services, so cloud infrastructure is the enabling substrate.
Cloud data warehouses are a cloud-service evolution of analytical data warehousing rather than a replacement for generic relational DBMS.
The direct lineage should flow through the more specific relational_data_warehousing node.
ERP systems are common data sources and deployment context, not direct prerequisites for cloud data warehouse services.
